interactionPlan.concept: The apparent motion field when a camera moves forward along the Z-axis, illustrating the focus of expansion.

interactions.label: Camera Speed
interactions.teaches: How changing the speed of the camera affects the rate of expansion of the motion field vectors.

interactions.label: Focus of Expansion
interactions.teaches: How the location of the focus of expansion affects the perceived motion of points across the surface.

interactions.label: Camera Motion
interactions.teaches: Visualizing the continuous expansion effect as the camera moves towards the planar surface.

interactionPlan.camera_suggestion: Positioned behind the camera and slightly above, facing towards the wall to see the motion field vectors expanding from the focus of expansion.
interactionPlan.notes: Ensure clarity of the motion vectors as they start from the focus of expansion and expand outward with varying speeds.

gpt-4o.notes: Complex interaction features added but core geometric and color aspects are not faithfully represented.
